"/> <任務 編號="128" 任務名稱="Register at Dark City Angel" 任務類型="Dark City-city quest" 任務前言="After leaving the Angel Lyceum, you become a member of Dark City. You must find the Angel hidden in Dark City. He will tell you some important notices.

He invites you to get rid of these annoying Field Mice to avoid having his crop devoured.
" 地點01="Spike Farm" 步驟01="1. Field Mice Tail: /c$9%295%/c* /10 " 地點02="Spike Farm" 承接02="Spike Farm" 步驟02="2. Take reward from Spike Farmer"/> <任務 編號="202" 任務名稱="Magic trick" 任務類型="Spike Farm" 任務前言="I wonder which Magician has turned the Pumpkins in melonland into monsters. They are scaring the children away. So the Spike Farmer asks you to clear up those Pumpkins.
" 地點01="Spike Farm" 步驟01="1. Pumpkin: /c$9%296%/c* /20" 地點02="Spike Farm" 承接02="Spike Farm " 步驟02="2. You have got rid of many Pumpkins and can report to
 Spike Farmer." 地點03="Spike Farm" 承接03="Spike Farmer" 步驟03="3. Take reward from Spike Farmer"/> <任務 編號="203" 任務名稱="The Jackstraw's protest" 任務類型="Spike Farm" 任務前言="Jackstraws are in an uprising over their overtime pay from the Spike Farmer. To help the Spike Farmer, you decide to [communicate]with the Jackstraws.
" 地點01="Spike Farm" 步驟01="1. Defeat Jackstraws: /c$9%297%/c* /20" 地點02="Spike Farm" 承接02="Spike Farmer" 步驟02="2. You have communicated with sufficient Jackstraws and can
 report to Spike Farmer." 地點03="Spike Farm" 承接03="Spike Farmer" 步驟03="3. Take reward from Spike Farmer"/> <任務 編號="204" 任務名稱="Sending parcels" 任務類型="Spike Farm" 任務前言="Spike Farmer gives you a parcel. Its touch is soft as if it is something like flour.
" 地點01="Spike Farm" 承接01="Farm Mistress" 步驟01="1. Go to find Farm Mistress" 地點02="Sunflower Plain" 承接02="Keeper" 步驟02="2. Take the parcel to Manor Keeper of Sunflower Plain
." 地點03="Sunflower Plain" 承接03="Keeper" 步驟03="3. Take reward from Manor Keeper"/> <任務 編號="205" 任務名稱="Delicious Pumpkin Pie" 任務類型="Spike Farm" 可否重接="可重接" 任務前言="Promise Farm Cook to collect enough Pumpkins for him and he will help you cook a delicious Pumpkin Pie.
" 地點01="Spike Farm" 步驟01="1. Pumpkin: /c$9%299%/c* /10 " 地點02="Spike Farm" 承接02="Farm Cook" 步驟02="2. " 地點01="Spike Farm" 步驟01="1. Field Mice: /c$9%300%/c* /20 " 地點02="Spike Farm" 承接02="Farm Cook" 步驟02="2. You have killed many Field Mice and can report to the Farm Cook
." 地點03="Spike Farm" 承接03="Farm Cook" 步驟03="3. Take reward from Farm Cook"/> <任務 編號="207" 任務名稱="Roasted Sashimi" 任務類型="Spike Farm" 可否重接="可重接" 任務前言="To taste the Farm Cook's best dish, Roasted Sashimi, players must collect sufficient straw.
" 地點01="Spike Farm" 步驟01="1. Straw: /c$9%301%/c* /10 " 地點02="Spike Farm" 承接02="Farm Cook" 步驟02="2. Take reward from Farm Cook"/> <任務 編號="208" 任務名稱="The Pumpkin's bad deed" 任務類型="Sunflower Farm" 可否重接="可重接" 任務前言="Because strange Magic Pumpkinman shows up in sunflower field, Clerk entrusts you to kill sufficient Magic Pumpkinman.
